creator: otacilio.neto@bsd.com.br
text:
Created attachment 194854
Error message log

VirtualBox fails to build

emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions fails to build on

FreeBSD nostromo 11.1-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p8 #0: Tue Mar 13 17:07:05 UTC 2018     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

To reproduce do a make build in 
emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions

Attached is a file with error message log
